mnemonics.title: Threading Models
mnemonics.content: MOM - Many-to-One Model (M any O ne M odel), OOM - One-to-One Model (O ne O ne M odel), MMM - Many-to-Many Model (M any M any M odel)

mnemonics.title: Thread Library Types
mnemonics.content: UKJ - User, Kernel, Java (major thread library approaches)

mnemonics.title: Thread Issues
mnemonics.content: FSTC - Fork/Exec, Signal handling, Thread cancellation, Thread-local storage (key threading issues)
